COVID-19 Information and Resources for People with Disabilities 
Jan. 2, 2026 
Key points 
These COVID-19 resources provide valuable information for people with disabilities and their families and caregivers. These COVID-19 materials include general information, vaccines, and guidance and planning documents.
Materials for People with Disabilities 
Easy to Reads 
Get Your COVID-19 Vaccines 
Find easy to read information about COVID-19 vaccines. 
COVID-19 Vaccination for Children 
Find easy to read information about children and COVID-19 vaccines. 
Improving the Air in Your Home 
COVID-19 info created for people who read or listen with understanding below a third-grade level. 
COVID-19 Can Make You Feel Sick 
Learn to identify COVID-19 symptoms, including difficulty breathing, fever, loss of taste or smell. 
People with Disabilities and COVID-19 
Get easy to read information from CDC on people with disabilities and COVID-19. 
Get Medicine for COVID-19
